title: Predictors of Energy and Fatigue in Graduate Health Sciences Students
author: Ali Boolani
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.udwes7e

steps.title: Complete the following surveys Pittsburgh Sleep...
steps.instruction: Complete the following surveys Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Inventory O'Connor Trait and State Mental and Physical Fatigue and Energy Survey Rapid Eating Assessment for Participants-Short Form Caffeine consumption survey International Physical Activity Questionnaire-Short Form Profile of Mood Survey- Short Form

steps.title: Fit participants with the mask to...
steps.instruction: Fit participants with the mask to measure RMR using the Cosmed Fitmate Pro Put the sleeve of the BSX Insight NIRS on the right lateral gastrocnemius Seat participants for 5 minutes Collect data for the next 10 minutes
